dashboard.backendEmpty: Backend is empty. Displaying mock data.
dashboard.lowDescription: No significant disease activity in your region.
dashboard.mediumDescription: HFMD and respiratory infections reported in nearby districts.
dashboard.highDescription: Multiple disease outbreaks confirmed. Restrict livestock movement.
dashboard.criticalDescription: Outbreak emergency. Contact vet immediately and isolate herd.
dashboard.connectionError: Cannot connect to server. Please check Backend.
dashboard.noDataAvailable: No data available. Please check Backend.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your Farm2Vets AI assistant. Ask me about your herd health, treatment plans, or disease alerts.
chat.suggestion1: What is the current herd health score?
chat.suggestion3: Any disease alerts I should know about?
chat.errorMessage: Unable to reach AI assistant. Please check your connection.

landing.heroTitle: Your herd intelligence hub for proactive animal health.
landing.heroDescription: Farm2Vets blends AI-powered notebook workflows, live sensor analytics, and seamless vet collaboration into a premium interface built for trusted decisions.
landing.walkthroughSubtitle: A polished guide to start using the AI Herd Notebook instantly.
landing.smartSummariesDescription: Instantly surface the top health signals and animal alerts.
landing.actionReadyAlertsDescription: See risk, treatment advice, and consultation triggers in one view.
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about the AI Herd Notebook and how it helps your farm.
landing.decisionTitle: Designed for modern farms, built to inspire confidence.
landing.decisionDescription: From real-time environmental intelligence to expert consultations, Farm2Vets brings the full livestock health workflow into one premium experience.
landing.aiSummary: Intelligent notebook summarization and alert prioritization.
landing.opsSummary: Live sensor telemetry and actionable barn insights.

feature1.title: AI-powered Herd Notebook
feature1.description: Capture every animal insight with smart notes, automated health flags, and action-ready recommendations.

feature2.title: Live Sensor Intelligence
feature2.description: Monitor barn conditions and disease risk in real time with sensor-driven alerts and precision analytics.

feature3.title: Veterinary Collaboration
feature3.description: Connect quickly with vets, schedule consults, and share actionable reports straight from the dashboard.

feature4.title: Risk Map & Forecasts
feature4.description: Visualize disease risk trends, heatmaps, and regional alerts to stay ahead of outbreaks.

faqs.question: How do I start using the AI Herd Notebook?
faqs.answer: Click Launch Notebook to open the notebook interface. Then add your herd details to begin tracking health events and alerts.

faqs.question: Can I switch between English and Vietnamese?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use the language switcher at the top of the page to toggle between EN and VI instantly.

faqs.question: What insights does the platform provide?
faqs.answer: Farm2Vets delivers automated health alerts, sensor analytics, risk heatmaps, and consult-ready reports for your livestock.

faqs.question: Is the walkthrough video available?
faqs.answer: Yes. The video placeholder shows the onboarding experience location, and it will be connected as a guided tutorial soon.
